title.tr: Bilgisayarı yeniden başlat ve BIOS'a gir

body.tr: Üretici tuşları: ASUS/MSI/Gigabyte → Del veya F2; HP → F10; Dell → F2; Lenovo → F1 veya F2; Acer → F2.
body.en: Vendor keys: ASUS/MSI/Gigabyte → Del or F2; HP → F10; Dell → F2; Lenovo → F1 or F2; Acer → F2.

body.tr: Intel: PTT (Platform Trust Technology). AMD: fTPM. ASUS: Advanced → Trusted Computing. HP: Security → TPM Embedded Security. Dell: Security → TPM 2.0 Security.
body.en: Intel: PTT. AMD: fTPM. ASUS: Advanced → Trusted Computing. HP: Security → TPM Embedded Security. Dell: Security → TPM 2.0 Security.
